case_title: TRINA RIGBY VS. CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION (CMC) et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RIGBY, TRINA AS TO DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION (CMC) EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY SERVICES OF SAN FRANCISCO(ECS) GOOD JOB BROTHERS JANITORIAL, LLC (GJB) COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP (CHP) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-08-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED A CONTRINUANCE TO SERVE DEFENDANT GOOD JOB BROTHERS JANITORIAL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY ALL OTHER NAMED DEFENDANTS. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-06-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP (CHP)
ORDER (SC-152)ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE GRANTED, PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-11-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT IS REPRESENTED BY ELIZABTH POCOCK,TRAVIS HAMILTON--ECS;LAURIE BERNSTEIN--DIRECTOR CHP;HUGO SANDOVAL--RESIDENT MGR./CARITAS;DELIA SICAIROS--PRESIDENT/GOOD JOB;JULIUS WILSON--PROPERTY SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIGBY, TRINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION (CMC) EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY SERVICES OF SAN FRANCISCO(ECS) GOOD JOB BROTHERS JANITORIAL, LLC (GJB) COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP (CHP) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
